markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discussion of SentinelOne's AI cybersecurity positioning and content strategy following CEO Tomer's direction.](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CEO wants to reposition SentinelOne as the leader in AI cybersecurity (ASI), expanding beyond breach prevention to protecting against systemic failures](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [SentinelOne's key AI differentiators include behavioral AI for endpoint detection and remediation, plus generative AI that enables natural language querying across consolidated security data](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Content strategy should leverage upcoming Black Hat and user conference presentations for thought leadership while building topical authority in AI security](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Team will continue discovery for two weeks before finalizing content plan; technical details about SentinelOne's AI capabilities will be provided](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Topics

### CEO's Vision for Cybersecurity Evolution

  - [Tomer believes cybersecurity is evolving from breach prevention to preventing systemic infrastructure failures (banks, water systems, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Wants to position SentinelOne as leader in AI Security Intelligence (ASI), though Bryan questions whether users search for "AI cybersecurity" specifically](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [PR agency analysis showed SentinelOne has opportunity to increase visibility in AI-powered cybersecurity messaging space](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [SentinelOne is "truly natively AI" from its inception, not adding AI as an afterthought like competitors](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=597.0)

### SentinelOne's AI Differentiators

  - [Behavioral AI capabilities on endpoint side collect and analyze user signals to detect atypical behaviors (e.g., lateral movement within environment)](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Data consolidation platform combines security data from multiple sources (endpoint, logs) that can be queried using natural language](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Solution offers advantages over competitors like Splunk and QRadar in terms of cost, usability, and ability to search across data](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [Latest Athena release allows deploying on top of existing SIEMs without migration, using AI to join and discover data](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
  - [Key selling point: AI capabilities have caught threats immediately that competitors like CrowdStrike missed for years](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Palo Alto Networks advertising "fighting AI with AI" but their platform is a collection of acquisitions with separate agents and consoles that don't integrate well](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)
  - [CrowdStrike's competing product (Charlotte) is still in beta with few customers; reports that "it doesn't work" compared to SentinelOne](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [SentinelOne demonstrating superiority through ThreatOps simulations where prospects can see tangible differences](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Product roadmap details for AI capabilities will be clearer after upcoming earnings report](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Marcel suggested leveraging upcoming events for content: capture slides/transcripts from Black Hat (next week) and user conference (November)](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Need to quickly turn conference presentations into content while audience interest is high](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1748.0)
  - [Tim Welford and Adam Hall preparing Black Hat presentations that could be recorded for content](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [Need to balance leading with topics people search for while incorporating unique SentinelOne perspective](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1925.0)
  - [Team considering covering OWASP LLM security topics to build topical authority, even if not immediate product focus](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Current target audiences/personas remain the same (security practitioners and CISOs)](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mahati to connect with Drew (back from vacation) regarding messaging review](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1816.0)
  - [Bryan to share technical capabilities overview and identify technical thought leaders](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Bryan to follow up with Tim Welford and Adam Hall about recording Black Hat presentations](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue discovery for two weeks before finalizing content plan](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [Bryan offered to join check-ins as needed and will share spreadsheet of audience personas by product](https://fathom.video/share/y_TR_NRaNfbUxUjq-u8j3D6ixa2zviNh?tab=summary&timestamp=1840.0)
